name: No Guilt Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a meatloaf size glass baking dish three times with the vegetable oil.
Put all dry ingredients in a large mixing bowl and blend with an electric mixer at low speed.
Put all wet ingredients into a smaller mixing bowl and whisk to blend.
Pour liquid ingredients into the larger bowl containing the dry ingredients. Add the nuts. Mix at medium speed thoroughly until shiny. Pour into prepared baking dish.
Bake for about 45 minutes or until toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Try not to over bake.
